overall.description: Static first-person view from a bed in a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment, featuring characteristic green neon lighting, checkered wall patterns, and modern industrial interior design typical of Cyberpunk 2077. The scene remains completely still throughout the clip with no movement or action occurring.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with adjacent bathroom

segments.scene_description: The scene presents a static first-person perspective from a bed in a cyberpunk-style apartment bedroom. The room is dimly lit with green neon accent lighting, featuring a checkered wall pattern, visible bathroom fixtures to the left, and various furniture pieces. No movement or changes occur throughout the segment, maintaining a moody, atmospheric stillness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment, preserving a mood of atmospheric stillness throughout. It begins from the vantage point of a bed, looking out into a bedroom defined by moody green neon accent lighting. As the gaze lingers, the industrial interior reveals a checkered wall pattern and various pieces of furniture. The scene remains fixed, holding its focus on the surrounding environment and the visible bathroom fixtures to the left before concluding in the same state of quiet suspension.
